title: anthoxanthum pluriflorum
intro: Anthoxanthum pluriflorum, also known as sweet vernal grass or cock's foot grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Anthoxanthum pluriflorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties. Anthoxanthum pluriflorum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
